Name: nixtla-anomaly-detector
What: Detects anomalies in time series using TimeGPT; identifies outliers, level shifts, trend breaks
When: Detecting unusual patterns, identifying anomalies; triggers: detect anomalies, find outliers
Where: Exploratory phase - after data collection, before forecasting
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Generates anomalies.csv, anomalies_plot.png, anomaly_summary.txt with correctly classified anomaly types
Definition_of_Success_Business: Enables early detection of data quality issues; reduces manual inspection effort
Target_Goal: true

Name: nixtla-arbitrage-detector
What: Identifies arbitrage opportunities between Polymarket and Kalshi by comparing prices across platforms
When: Finding price discrepancies, profitable trading opportunities; triggers: find arbitrage, compare prices
Where: Market analysis phase - real-time opportunity detection
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Outputs arbitrage_opportunities.csv with calculated profit percentages and arbitrage_report.md
Definition_of_Success_Business: Identifies profitable trades; supports quantitative trading strategies
Target_Goal: Detect arbitrage > 1% spread between platforms

Name: nixtla-batch-forecaster
What: Processes 10-100+ time series in parallel using TimeGPT with rate limiting and fallback
When: Batch processing large contract portfolios; triggers: batch forecast, parallel forecasting
Definition_of_Success_Technical: all_forecasts.csv with 100% success rate, summary.json with metadata, batch_report.md
Definition_of_Success_Business: Enables enterprise-scale forecasting; handles high-volume workloads
Target_Goal: Process 100 series in single batch; 100% completion rate

Name: nixtla-contract-schema-mapper

Definition_of_Success_Technical: nixtla_data.csv with correct schema, time_series_plot.png, transformation summary
Definition_of_Success_Business: Standardizes data ingestion; eliminates manual data wrangling
Target_Goal: Output valid Nixtla schema from any CSV input
